description: Style Note The man of substance always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it just that much easier with these stylish casual trousers. Designed with the best cotton fabric, this pair makes for a perfect daily office or partywear option. Pair it with a checked shirt and casual shoes. Product Details Beige trousers has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets at the back with button closures, brand patch above the right hip pocket, metal zip and button closure and comfortable waistband with belt loops Material and Care 100% linen Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
